detail: init objective="Update opencodex documentation (README x3 languages + docs-site) for the multi-agent v2 prompt-injection feature set shipped in v2.7.2/v2.7.3: injection model/effort designation, subagentModels roster with catalog-honest effort ladders, v2 collab surface detection (incl. responses_lite additional_tools), <=700-char v2 guidance, injectionPrompt {{model}}/{{effort}}/{{roster}} override, v1 Proactive-only.
